name: nihil
description: Evidence-gated maintainability discipline in two layers: a native hook-enforced review/implement/release mode plugin (a discipline aid, not a security boundary) plus a summonable pantheon of five first-principles dynamic workflows (/nihil, /nihil-maat, /nihil-odin, /nihil-shiva, /nihil-athena) installed via /nihil:summon.
